item.title: Electric blues
item.description: Blues → Electric blues Period: 1938–present (peak: late 1940s–late 1960s) Location: Chicago, Memphis, Texas, Los Angeles Key influences: Delta blues, country blues, jump blues, gospel, jazz RYM A guitar string bent through a cheap amplifier in a loud club on Chicago’s South Side, the note hanging in...

item.title: Swamp blues
item.description: Blues → Electric blues → Swamp blues Period: 1954–1970 Location: Baton Rouge, recorded in Crowley, Louisiana Key influences: Electric blues, zydeco, Cajun music RYM The laziest beat in the blues: a shuffle that sounds half-asleep, drums brushed down to a whisper, tremolo guitar hanging in the humidi...

item.title: Electric Texas blues
item.description: Blues → Electric blues → Electric Texas blues Period: 1942–present Location: Dallas and Houston, later Austin Key influences: Acoustic Texas blues, jazz, jump blues RYM A single-string line that phrases like a horn.

item.title: Piano blues
item.description: Blues → Piano blues Period: c. 1900–present Location: The barrelhouse circuit, then Chicago, St.

item.title: Jug band
item.description: Blues → Acoustic blues → Jug band Period: c.

item.title: Acoustic Chicago blues
item.description: Blues → Acoustic blues → Acoustic Chicago blues Period: c.

item.title: Acoustic Texas blues
item.description: Blues → Acoustic blues → Acoustic Texas blues Period: c.
